evidence_rules: Toy rubric has highest priority inside this fixture only.
ASCReview source patterns may support workflow testing but cannot add toy scoring criteria.
Factual oncology comments must be provisional because no source pack is provided.
Repository, single-cell, spatial, pathway, and figure comments must cite rule IDs when used.
stop_conditions: Stop if asked to generalize toy rubric to real dissertation review.
Stop if asked to adjudicate factual oncology without sources.
Stop if user-provided dissertation text is substituted into this toy fixture.
Stop if asked to infer missing accession, figure, data, or code details.
